intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“飞行出租车 -> 小型瑞士飞机 -> 七名乘客 -> 特殊降落 -> 服务路线 -> 安全拒绝”的路线图读顺。

sentences.text: Captain Ben Fawcett has bought an unusual taxi and has begun a new service.
sentences.focus_zh: Captain Ben Fawcett 是人名；has bought 和 has begun 要读出这个服务已经开始。

sentences.text: The 'taxi' is a small Swiss aeroplane called a 'Pilatus Porter'.
sentences.focus_zh: called a Pilatus Porter 是同位说明；不要把飞机名字读成一串散音。

sentences.text: This wonderful plane can carry seven passengers.
sentences.focus_zh: can carry 是能力；seven passengers 要连成一个数量组。

sentences.text: It can land anywhere: on snow, water, or even on a ploughed field.
sentences.focus_zh: 冒号后面是三个降落地点；or even 要读出最后一项更惊讶。

sentences.text: Captain Fawcett's first passenger was a doctor who flew from Birmingham to a lonely village in the Welsh mountains.
sentences.focus_zh: from Birmingham to a lonely village 是路线；lonely 在这里偏向 remote / isolated。

sentences.text: Since then, Captain Fawcett has flown passengers to many unusual places.
sentences.focus_zh: Since then 后面稍停；has flown passengers 表示从那以后到现在的服务记录。

sentences.text: On another occasion, he landed in a deserted car park.
sentences.focus_zh: On another occasion 是另一次；deserted car park 是空的停车场，不是 desert。

sentences.text: The man wanted to fly to Rockall, a lonely island in the Atlantic Ocean, but Captain Fawcett did not take him because the trip was too dangerous.
sentences.focus_zh: Rockall, a lonely island in the Atlantic Ocean 是地点同位说明；because 后面给出安全理由。
